evals.prompt: I just changed the help overlay layout in internal/ui/components.go — can you check if the rendering still looks right?
evals.expected_output: Runs snapshot tests focusing on the help overlay, shows pass/fail result, and if the golden file differs, displays the diff and asks whether to update the snapshot.

evals.prompt: I'm starting the project fresh — there are no snapshot tests yet. Set up visual snapshot testing for the main todo list view.
evals.expected_output: Creates testdata/todos.json fixture with deterministic data, writes a teatest-based snapshot test for the main view, runs it to generate the initial golden file, and shows the rendered output for confirmation.
Recognizes this as a request to run the full snapshot test suite, executes all existing snapshot tests, and reports results with diffs for any failures.
